# Photix

> Photix is a free iOS app (iPhone and iPad) for AI image creation. It bundles three creative modes: AI Generate (text-to-image with ten curated art styles), AI Edit (change any photo by describing the edit conversationally), and AI Avatar (turn a selfie into themed portraits — superhero, anime, Renaissance, and more). No design skills or account required. Free to try; Photix PRO removes watermarks, ads, and limits.

Photix is part of the AI Photo Journey family of AI creativity apps (https://ai-photo-journey.com).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://photix.app/): What Photix does and why people love it
- [Features](https://photix.app/features): Overview of the creative modes
- [AI Image Generator](https://photix.app/features/ai-image-generator): Text-to-image generation
- [AI Photo Editor](https://photix.app/features/ai-photo-editor): Conversational photo editing
- [AI Avatar Maker](https://photix.app/features/ai-avatar): Themed portraits from one selfie
- [Art Styles](https://photix.app/features/art-styles): The ten curated style recipes
- [Avatar Ideas](https://photix.app/avatar-ideas): Inspiration for what to become first
- [Use Cases](https://photix.app/use-cases): Who uses Photix and for what
- [FAQ](https://photix.app/faq): Common questions, PRO, privacy, and billing
- [About](https://photix.app/about): The team and the AI Photo Journey family

## Facts

- Platform: iOS (iPhone and iPad), download at https://apps.apple.com/us/app/image-generator-photix/id6745130814
- No account or login required
- Free tier with watermark and ads; PRO removes both and lifts limits
- Sibling apps: FxAI (https://fxai.app), Videx (https://videx.app), SwapTo (https://swapto.app), PicAlive (https://picalive.app)
